Language Certification

JLPT

Japanese Language Proficiency Test

The JLPT is the world's most recognized Japanese proficiency test. Whether you're aiming for N5 basics or the prestige of N1, our expert instructors guide you through every level with proven methods.

Enroll NowAsk a Question
📚
LevelsN5 → N1
Duration3–12 Months
FormatOnline + Offline
ExamDec & July
Reserve Your Spot
What is JLPT?

About the Test

The Japanese Language Proficiency Test (JLPT) is conducted jointly by the Japan Foundation and Japan Educational Exchanges and Services. It is the most widely accepted proof of Japanese language ability, recognized by universities, companies, and immigration authorities worldwide.

Tests are held twice a year (July and December) in Nepal and across the world. We provide full preparation from beginner (N5) to advanced (N1) levels.

JLPT Levels

N5

Beginner — Basic understanding of Japanese used in everyday situations.

N4

Elementary — Understanding basic Japanese in familiar situations.

N3

Intermediate — Understanding Japanese used in everyday situations to a certain degree.

N2

Upper Intermediate — Understanding Japanese in a broad range of topics.

N1

Advanced — Ability to understand Japanese in a wide range of demanding situations.

What We Cover

Course Curriculum

Vocabulary

Word Power

  • N5–N1 core vocabulary lists
  • Kanji by level (103 to 2000+)
  • Contextual usage practice
  • Flashcard & spaced repetition system
Grammar

Structure Mastery

  • All grammar patterns by level
  • Particle usage deep dive
  • Complex sentence structures (N2–N1)
  • Error correction exercises
Skills

Test Skills

  • Reading comprehension by section
  • Listening with authentic JLPT audio
  • Full-length mock exams
  • Time management strategies
Batches

Class Schedule

📅
N5 / N4 Batch
Sunday – Thursday
7:00 AM – 9:00 AM
📅
N3 / N2 Batch
Monday – Friday
5:00 PM – 7:00 PM
📅
N1 Weekend Batch
Saturday – Sunday
10:00 AM – 2:00 PM
